description_long: This house features a complex, multi-volume structure with a combination of steeply pitched gable roofs and flat roof sections. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with an arched door, flanked by a mix of rectangular and triangular dormer windows, and a visible garage door on one side. The exterior is predominantly white, with black accents on the roof edges and window frames, giving it a crisp, modern-traditional appearance. The rear of the house reveals a large balcony or terrace with a railing, and the window arrangement is asymmetrical, with various sizes and placements. The house sits on a green lawn base, suggesting a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood context. The overall design blends elements of Tudor Revival and contemporary residential architecture.
description: A large, white multi-story house with steep gable roofs, black accents, and a mix of traditional and modern design elements, featuring an arched entryway and a rear balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an arched door, garage door, and a mix of gable and dormer windows.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal window openings and a simple, flat facade, lacking the entry and garage details.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement and the extended balcony or terrace with railing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view dominated by the long balcony/terrace and railing, with fewer visible windows and no entry features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of dormer and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door with a small step, no porch, and minimal decorative elements; garage door adjacent.
